open_gaps.SEC-002: LOW (unchanged). Still no numPages>1000 cap at viewer.js loadDocument() (the single load boundary), and no cumulative-queued-bytes cap at the multi-file ingest boundaries (merge.js queued PDFs, img2pdf.js queued images). This tick's two new feature modules are NOT new ingest boundaries: split-chunks.js (TASK-358) and flatten.js (TASK-359) both read ONLY the ALREADY-OPEN, already-validated document via currentDoc.getData(), build fresh pdf-lib docs (open doc never mutated), and upload nothing. split-chunks.js is a bounded output-amplifier (ceil(numPages/N) parts, each carrying copied resources; bytes buffered in entries[] then concatenated into one ZIP Uint8Array via the shared zip-writer.js — peak ~ sum of part PDFs + ZIP; parts saved sequentially to keep work serial). flatten.js is 1:1 pages (pure pdf-lib getForm().flatten()), no amplification. Same LOW self-DoS family as the other per-page consumers — uploader's own tab only, no server impact, all bounded by the same single fix: page-count cap once at the viewer load boundary (covers every per-page consumer) + cumulative-bytes caps in merge.js/img2pdf.js addFiles(). Developer task, not security's to implement.
open_gaps.SEC-CSP-FRAME: INFO. frame-src 'self' blob: in the live CSP (added 2026-06-13 for the Print tool, print.js). Allows only same-origin + same-origin-blob frames, no remote origins; frame-ancestors 'self' unchanged. Verified live this tick.

notes: 50 JS modules (+3 since the 2026-06-13 16:25 burst.js review: split-chunks.js TASK-358, flatten.js TASK-359, and the new shared zip-writer.js — the STORE-only ZIP writer factored out of burst.js so Burst and Split-into-Chunks share one already-verified implementation). ALL THREE CLEAN, no new findings. NONE is a new ingest/upload boundary: split-chunks and flatten operate only on the ALREADY-VALIDATED open viewer document via pdf.js doc.getData() (open doc never mutated, nothing leaves the browser), so no separate upload validation applies. zip-writer.js review: standard CRC32 (IEEE 802.3) table, every DataView write in-bounds for its allocated buffer (30+name local headers, 46+name central records, 22-byte EOCD), fixed local-header+central-dir+EOCD layout, 32-bit fields with documented no-ZIP64 rationale (<4GB), no eval/Function/document.write; ZIP entry names are app-generated ASCII only (page-NN.pdf / part-NN_pages-FF-TT.pdf) — no path traversal, no user string in entry names; downloadBytes uses Blob + rel=noopener + setTimeout URL.revokeObjectURL(1s). burst.js now imports the shared writer; deploy is byte-identical to repo web/. Both feature modules: filename sanitized [^a-zA-Z0-9._-]->_ slice(180) -> <base>-chunks.zip / <base>_flattened.pdf; status via textContent only (never innerHTML); guards for no-doc/numPages==0 and window.PDFLib-unready; errors caught -> inline status + EventBus.ERROR; both talk to the app only through EventBus (PDF_LOADED/PDF_CLEARED) + ActionRegistry — viewer rendering core and .pdf-viewer-container layout untouched. split-chunks parser is strict numeric (whole number >=1, never silent). New-file audit: zero innerHTML/outerHTML/insertAdjacentHTML/document.write/eval/new Function/fetch/XHR across all 3 files; node --check clean; all serve 200; repo web/ vs /var/www webroot diff CLEAN for zip-writer.js/split-chunks.js/flatten.js/burst.js/app.js/index.html. Live headers via curl: full resource CSP (default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; worker-src 'self' blob:; img-src 'self' blob: data:; connect-src 'self' blob:; frame-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'; font-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'), X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN, Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff. nginx -t OK. Path blocking: .git/config 403, CLAUDE.md 403, *.sh 403, *.bak 403, js/*.js 200. SSH: 0 failed/invalid auth in last 24h. Secret scan clean (ssh-login-detector.sh grep-pattern hits are false positives, not credentials). Disk 44% used, 7.9G free. TLS: none yet (HTTP-only until cronloop.techtools.cz DNS cutover, expected).
